title: Resolution to Suspend the Conduct of Regular Sessions Including Committee Meetings / Hearings of the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños in View of the Implementation of the Reverted Modified Enhanced Community Quarantine (MECQ) in the Province of Laguna Due to Corona Virus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) From August 4 to 18, 2020. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 08/03/2020)
